title: Startup PhysicsX Hits $2.4 Billion Valuation to Provide AI for Manufacturing

title: Intesa Sanpaolo Board Said to Meet to Review Monte Paschi Bid

summary: Intesa Sanpaolo SpA is preparing a bid for Banca Monte dei Paschi di Siena SpA, hours after rival Banco BPM SpA proposed a €50 billion ($58 billion) tie-up, according to people familiar with the matter, injecting fresh momentum into a two-year consolidation push that’s transforming Italy’s finance industry.

title: Air France-KLM Keeps Door Ajar on EasyJet Role as Bid Looms
title_cn: 法航-荷航集团对易捷航空的投标保持开放态度

title: Oil Jumps as Iran and Israel Exchange Fire With Truce at Risk

title: Stock Losses Build as AI Rally Cools, Oil Jumps: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着人工智能涨势降温、油价上涨，股市损失加剧：市场结束
summary: Stocks and bonds dropped as investors faced a trio of headwinds with a pullback in the artificial-intelligence trade, mounting bets on a US interest rate hike and rising oil prices due to a worsening of the Middle East conflict.

title: IMF Chief: We Can't Repeat the Mistakes of Globalization With AI
title_cn: 国际货币基金组织总裁：我们不能用人工智能重复全球化的错误
summary: International Monetary Fund Managing Director Kristalina Georgieva has spent the past six years navigating some of the biggest challenges facing the global economy — from the Covid-19 pandemic and Russia's full-scale invasion of Ukraine to the rapid emergence of artificial intelligence. In this episode of Leaders With Francine Lacqua, Georgieva discusses what it takes to lead an institution representing 191 countries, how the IMF approaches economic crises and why trust is essential when governments are asked to make difficult reforms. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Danantara to Start US Bond Roadshow as Indonesia Rout Deepens
title_cn: 随着印尼溃败加剧，达纳塔拉将启动美国债券路演
summary: Indonesian sovereign wealth fund Danantara is poised to kick off the US leg of its planned dollar bond roadshow this week, as the nation’s policymakers step up efforts to halt a deepening selloff in the nation’s markets.

title: Goldman Sees Rupee Weakness Capped After Steps to Boost Inflows
title_cn: 高盛认为在采取措施增加资金流入后卢比疲软将受到限制
summary: The Indian rupee’s slide may be nearing a floor after authorities unveiled measures to boost foreign inflows, according to Goldman Sachs Group Inc.

title: Stocks Tumble as AI Trades Unwind | The Asia Trade 6/8/2026
title_cn: 人工智能交易平仓，股市暴跌亚洲贸易 6/8/2026
summary: "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ECB Risks Repeating 2011 Mistake With Rate Hike, Economists Warn
title_cn: 经济学家警告欧洲央行加息可能会重蹈2011年的覆辙
summary: The European Central Bank’s resolve to uphold its inflation-quashing reputation risks luring it into a damaging error when it meets this week, economists warn.

title: Indonesia Market Rout Deepens as Bonds, Currency, Stocks Slide
title_cn: 随着债券、货币和股票下滑，印尼市场跌势加剧
summary: The rout in Indonesian markets deepened on Monday with the nation’s bonds, stocks and currency tumbling.

title: ‘Odd Lots’ Meets ‘The China Show’: Stock Rout Hits Asia
title_cn: “零星”遇上“中国秀”：股市暴跌席卷亚洲
summary: Asian stocks dropped Monday as AI-related shares sold off after a blistering rally, led by losses in Korean chipmakers SK Hynix and Samsung. Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway from Bloomberg’s Odd Lots podcast join Yvonne Man and Stephen Engle on The China Show. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Altitude Sickness Brings Stocks Down — Hard
title_cn: 高原反应导致股市下跌—— 难的
summary: A raft of IPOs led by Elon Musk’s SpaceX threatens to intensify the condition.

title: Saudis Lower July Oil Prices, Though Still at Decades High
title_cn: 沙特降低 7 月油价，但仍处于数十年高位
summary: Saudi Arabia cut the price of its main crude grade to Asia for a second straight month, though the premium for barrels to the kingdom’s largest market remained near the highest in decades.

title: Korean Stocks Tumble as Unwinding AI Trades Threaten Bull Run
title_cn: 人工智能交易平仓威胁牛市，韩国股市暴跌
summary: South Korean stocks plunged, imperiling the world’s biggest rally, as investors pulled back from artificial intelligence bets that have fueled the global bull market in equities.

title: Treasuries Drop as Jobs Data, Iran Tensions Fuel Rate Hike Bets
title_cn: 由于就业数据和伊朗紧张局势加剧加息押注，美国国债下跌
summary: Treasuries fell as investors ramped up bets that the Federal Reserve will need to raise interest rates, while escalating tensions in the Middle East added to inflation concerns.

title: Flood Warnings for South China Farmlands Raise Rice-Crop Risks
title_cn: 华南农田的洪水警报增加了水稻作物的风险
summary: Forecasts for heavy rains in southern China over the next week are raising the risk of flash floods, potentially inundating crops and damaging rice fields.

title: Copper Rebounds From Friday Slump on China-Buying and US Flows
title_cn: 铜价从周五暴跌中反弹，因中国购买和美国资金流入
summary: Copper edged up to recoup some of last week’s losses as buying activity in China and flows of metal to the US supported the demand outlook.

title: Goldman’s Japan Chief Counts on New Leaders for Growth
title_cn: 高盛日本业务主管依靠新领导人来实现增长
summary: Goldman Sachs Japan president Hidehiro Imatsu is promoting younger executives at the firm as a merger boom, rising stocks and volatile bond yields fuel the most intense talent war in years.

title: Nvidia CEO Says Selloff in Tech Stocks Is a Buying Opportunity
title_cn: 英伟达首席执行官表示科技股的抛售是一个买入机会
summary: Nvidia Corp. Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang called a global tech stocks selloff that began last week a buying opportunity, saying the buildout of artificial intelligence has just begun.

title: Indonesia’s Foreign Reserves Suffer Longest Decline Since 2018
title_cn: 印尼外汇储备出现 2018 年以来最长跌幅
summary: Indonesia’s foreign-exchange reserves fell for a fifth straight month in May, underscoring the cost of policymakers’ efforts to steady the rupiah after its slide to a record low.

title: Goldman’s Moe Sees Korea Stock Rebound After ‘Scary’ Correction
title_cn: 高盛的 Moe 认为韩国股市在“可怕”修正后反弹
summary: South Korean stocks are expected to bounce back after a drop that triggered a circuit breaker, said Timothy Moe, Goldman Sachs chief Asia-Pacific regional equity strategist.

title: China Coking Coal Hits Highest Since 2024 on Safety Shutdowns
title_cn: 中国焦煤安全停产创2024年以来新高
summary: Chinese coking coal rose to the highest since 2024 as the aftermath of a deadly mining accident and ongoing safety inspections kept prices elevated.

title: Japanese Pension Fund Proxies Buy Record Foreign Bonds in May
title_cn: 日本养老基金代理五月份外国债券购买量创历史新高
summary: Proxies for Japanese pension funds bought a record amount of overseas bonds last month, adding to signs of robust demand for foreign debt even as local yields climbed.

title: Gold Extends Loss as Israel-Iran Clashes Endanger Mideast Truce
title_cn: 以色列和伊朗冲突危及中东停战，黄金扩大跌幅
summary: Gold extended a decline after Israel said it struck Iranian targets in response to missile attacks by Tehran, threatening a fragile ceasefire in the Middle East.

title: Asia Coal Prices Rise to 22-Month High on Indonesia Export Rules
title_cn: 印尼出口规则影响亚洲煤炭价格升至 22 个月高点
summary: A key coal benchmark for Asia rose to the highest level in nearly two years as Indonesia’s new export rules delayed shipments, tightening supplies just as demand for the power-plant fuel rises with the onset of summer.

title: Japan’s Nikkei Slumps as Tech Selloff, Iran Tensions Deepen
title_cn: 随着科技股抛售和伊朗紧张局势加剧，日本日经指数暴跌
summary: Japanese stocks fell by the most since March as AI shares retreated from their highs amid rising expectations that the Federal Reserve will keep rates higher for longer following strong US jobs data.

title: Goldman’s Moe on the Slump in South Korea Stocks
title_cn: 高盛莫伊谈韩国股市暴跌
summary: Timothy Moe, Goldman Sachs chief APAC regional equity strategist, says he expects South Korean stocks to bounce back after the drop that triggered a circuit breaker. He speaks with with Haidi Stroud-Watts and Shery Ahn on Bloomberg. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Korea Unveils Measures to Stem Won Slide, Curb Speculation
title_cn: 韩国推出阻止韩元下滑、抑制投机的措施
summary: South Korea unveiled targeted steps to support the won after it fell to the weakest level since 2009, pledging firm action against speculative trading and other activities seen as amplifying recent volatility.

title: Iran Fires Missiles at Israel as Trump Defends Ceasefire
title_cn: 特朗普捍卫停火，伊朗向以色列发射导弹
summary: Iran fired several rounds of missiles toward Israel, as President Donald Trump pushed to preserve a faltering ceasefire in the US’s 100-day conflict with Tehran. Bloomberg's Laura Davison breaks down the latest developments. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Japan’s Growth Holds Up Despite Drop in Business Investment
title_cn: 尽管商业投资下降，日本经济仍保持增长
summary: Japan’s economy grew at a still solid pace at the start of the year even after the turbulence in Iran prompted businesses to cut investment.

title: Air New Zealand Steps Up Flight Cuts as Fuel Costs Mount
title_cn: 随着燃油成本上涨，新西兰航空加大航班削减力度
summary: Air New Zealand will cut more flights in the three months through October as it faces rising jet fuel costs and soft demand, particularly in its home market, Chief Executive Officer Nikhil Ravishankar said.

title: Bitcoin Steadies After $60,000 Breach as Saylor Hints at Buying
title_cn: Saylor 暗示买入 比特币突破 60,000 美元后企稳
summary: Bitcoin steadied in Asia trading Monday after dropping below $60,000 late last week as Strategy Inc. Chairman Michael Saylor hinted at further purchases.

title: AXA Global Private CEO on Wealth Strategy
title_cn: 安盛全球私人首席执行官谈财富战略
summary: Sally Wan, CEO of AXA Global Private and AXA Greater China, discusses the outlook for the insurance firm's new platform launched at helping high-net-worth and ultra-high-net-worth clients manage their wealth, and look for investment opportunities. She speaks exclusively with Haidi Stroud Watts on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Korean Stocks Under Pressure, Jensen Huang in Seoul
title_cn: 韩国股市面临压力，黄仁勋在首尔
summary: South Korean stocks plunged as investors pulled back from artificial intelligence bets. Meanwhile, a tech-centered camaraderie was on display last week with Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's night out in Seoul with South Korea's tech corporate royalty, including leaders from SK Group, LG Group and Naver Corp. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: アップルAI危機の舞台裏、新Siri誕生までの知られざる社内攻防－Power On
title_cn: 苹果AI危机的幕后，导致新Siri诞生的不为人知的内部斗争 - Power On
summary: アップルがAI分野の劣勢を真剣に受け止めるきっかけとなった極秘会議。Siri刷新の舞台裏に迫る。

title: JPMorgan Hires Nomura’s International AI Strategy Chief
title_cn: 摩根大通聘请野村国际人工智能战略主管
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. is hiring Nomura Holdings Inc.’s international head of artificial intelligence strategy, according to people familiar with the matter, as the Wall Street bank steps up recruitment of AI specialists to boost productivity.

title: Korea’s Lee Marks First Year With Vow to Find New Growth Engines
title_cn: 韩国李在镕庆祝第一年誓言寻找新的增长引擎
summary: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung said his administration will unveil a large-scale investment project aimed at supporting a wider range of future growth engines while also preparing plans to leverage excess tax revenue generated by the semiconductor industry.

title: China’s Moonshot AI Seeks $30 Billion Value in New Funding Talks
title_cn: 中国的 Moonshot AI 在新的融资谈判中寻求 300 亿美元的价值
summary: Moonshot AI is seeking as much as $2 billion in a new funding round that would value the startup at $30 billion, initiating its third financing in six months to keep pace with rivals in China’s intensifying artificial intelligence race.

title: Korea’s AI Impact Sparks Pressure Across Government Bond Market
title_cn: 韩国的人工智能影响引发整个政府债券市场的压力
summary: Investor fervor for artificial intelligence that has driven South Korea’s volatile stock market to the top of global rankings is taking a toll on another market: government bonds.

title: Nvidia, SK Hynix Seal Multi-Year Pact to Develop AI Chips
title_cn: Nvidia 与 SK Hynix 签署多年开发人工智能芯片协议
summary: Nvidia Corp. and SK Hynix Inc. have agreed to partner on designing future generations of memory chips for AI, a win for a South Korean leader vying with Samsung Electronics Co. in a red-hot arena.

title: Spotify Plans to Add Live Concert Video, Tickets
title_cn: Spotify 计划添加现场音乐会视频和门票
summary: Spotify is looking to become a hub for live music

title: Sheinbaum Unveils Affordable EV Prototype Backed by Government
title_cn: Sheinbaum 推出由政府支持的经济实惠的电动汽车原型
summary: An electric vehicle startup backed by the Mexican government unveiled its first prototype in a ceremony featuring President Claudia Sheinbaum, who praised the project as an affordable mobility option and a showcase for homegrown engineering.

title: Naver to Use Nvidia’s AI Models in Bid to Cement Lead in Korea
title_cn: Naver 将使用 Nvidia 的 AI 模型巩固在韩国的领先地位
summary: South Korea’s Naver Corp. agreed to build data centers based on Nvidia Corp.’s models in a move to clinch its dominance in the country’s artificial intelligence landscape.

title: Starmer to Roll Out UK Job Center Tools to Beat AI Work Threat
title_cn: Starmer 将推出英国就业中心工具来应对人工智能工作威胁
summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer will promise to prevent any community from being left behind in the “tech revolution” by using artificial intelligence tools to help people find work.

title: Stocks Face Rising Risk With Mega AI Deals Ready to Flood Market
title_cn: 大型人工智能交易准备涌入市场，股票面临不断上升的风险
summary: A flood of new shares from companies looking to fund their artificial intelligence ambitions is raising questions on Wall Street about whether there will be enough buyers to soak them all up and what this pile of fresh equity will mean for stock prices more broadly.

title: Kevin O’Leary’s Huge Data Center in Canada Faces a Skeptical Public
title_cn: 凯文·奥利里 (Kevin O’Leary) 位于加拿大的庞大数据中心面临公众的怀疑
summary: A proposal by a Kevin O’Leary-backed firm to build Canada’s largest data center in northwestern Alberta is facing pushback from some residents and Indigenous groups.

title: Why an AI 'Death Spiral' Threatens the Internet
title_cn: 为什么人工智能“死亡螺旋”威胁互联网
summary: For decades, publishers depended on search engines to send readers to their websites, where advertising helped fund the creation of online content. But the rise of AI-powered search is changing that model. Researchers like Rand Fishkin say “zero-click” searches are increasingly keeping users inside platforms rather than sending them to publishers, while Rutgers professor Caitlin Petre warns that falling traffic could threaten the long-term economics of journalism and content creation. Yet some large publishers are adapting. People Inc. CEO Neil Vogel says his company has offset declining search traffic through brand diversification, social media distribution, licensing agreements, and paid partnerships with AI companies. The broader question is whether the internet can continue producing the content AI depends on if fewer creators are paid for their work.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Inside Apple’s Secret Meeting That Led It to Finally Take AI Seriously
title_cn: 苹果公司最终认真对待人工智能的秘密会议
summary: Also: What to expect at WWDC 2026.

title: Nvidia’s CEO Says New Vera Chip Will Use SK Hynix’s Memory Chips
title_cn: Nvidia首席执行官表示新的Vera芯片将使用SK Hynix的存储芯片
summary: Nvidia Corp. Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang said its new Vera central processing units will use SK Hynix Inc.’s memory chips as the two companies prepare to do more business in the coming year.

title: UK to Buy AI Chips From British Tech Firms, Telegraph Reports
title_cn: 据《每日电讯报》报道，英国将从英国科技公司购买人工智能芯片
summary: The UK will offer to buy artificial intelligence chips from technology companies in an effort to encourage them to stay in Britain, the Telegraph reported on Sunday.

title: SKorea’s Lee Nominates Tech Guru Han as PM to Lead AI Growth
title_cn: SKorea 的 Lee 提名技术大师 Han 为总理，领导人工智能的发展
summary: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung nominated SME and Startup Minister Han Seong-sook as prime minister, betting the tech industry veteran will help the country realize its artificial intelligence ambitions.

title: China Starts Prefabricated Power Hub for Data Centers, CCTV Says
title_cn: 央视报道中国启动数据中心预制电力中心
summary: China’s first prefabricated computing power hub has started operations, offering a faster and lower-cost way to build and supply electricity to data centers, according to a report from China Central Television.

title: Venture Capital Trends to Watch in Africa
title_cn: 非洲值得关注的风险投资趋势
summary: As funding conditions tighten, investment into African startups held up in 2025. Bloomberg's Jennifer Zabasajja spoke with venture capital investor Tokunboh Ishmael from Alitheia Capital for a view from investors on the ground. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Puts EVs on a Diet as Battery Boom Adds Bulk, CCTV Reports
title_cn: 据央视报道，随着电池热潮增加，中国对电动汽车进行节食
summary: China wants slimmer electric vehicles after years of bigger batteries and rising demand for space and features helped make passenger cars significantly larger and heavier, state broadcaster China Central Television reported on Sunday.

title: Trump AI Policy Adviser Krishnan Is Giving Up White House Role
title_cn: 特朗普人工智能政策顾问克里希南将放弃白宫角色
summary: Sriram Krishnan, a top White House adviser on artificial intelligence, is stepping down from the post.

title: Grindr Growing From Just Dating App to Politics, AI
title_cn: Grindr 从单纯的约会应用程序发展到政治、人工智能
summary: Grindr Inc. unveiled a handful of new app features and shared more details around its premium subscription tier as part of a larger effort to integrate artificial intelligence across its LGBTQ dating platform. The premium plan unlocks access to new AI features and deeper personalization, Grindr said Monday in a statement. The company is also investing further in AI-powered safety tools and in behind-the-scenes operations, Chief Executive Officer George Arison said in an interview with Bloomberg This Weekend. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bitcoin Drop Tests Retail Investor Strength
title_cn: 比特币下跌考验散户投资者实力
summary: For years, Wall Street has benefited from one of the most reliable forces in modern markets: a retail-trader army willing to buy almost anything. Friday offered a glimpse of what happens when several of those trades come under pressure at the same time. Artificial-intelligence stocks suffered their sharpest selloff in months, Bitcoin fell below $60,000 and bond yields surged as traders revived bets that the Federal Reserve’s next move could be a rate increase. Bloomberg Intelligence Senior Commodity Strategist Mike McGlone and Navy Federal Credit Union Chief Economist Heather Long joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Elon Musk to Attend ASML’s Private Tech Event to Discuss Terafab
title_cn: 埃隆·马斯克将出席 ASML 的私人技术活动讨论 Terafab
summary: Elon Musk will virtually attend a closed door technology conference run by ASML Holding NV to discuss his Terafab project, which the chip-equipment maker considers a “serious endeavor.”

title: Trump Signals Interest in US Owning Stakes in Top AI Labs
title_cn: 特朗普表示有兴趣在美国顶级人工智能实验室中持有股份
summary: President Donald Trump expressed interest in the US government holding equity stakes in leading artificial intelligence developers, saying that he planned to discuss the idea of a partnership with AI companies’ executives as soon as next week. Bloomberg Surveillance Co-Host and Chief Political Correspondent Annmarie Horden joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why Susquehanna Is Building a Prediction Markets Business
title_cn: 萨斯奎哈纳为何要建立预测市场业务
summary: Creating an asset class for bets on anything.

title: Australia’s Far-Right One Nation Tops Labor in Opinion Poll
title_cn: 澳大利亚极右翼国家在民意调查中领先工党
summary: Australia’s populist One Nation party has edged ahead of the ruling Labor Party in a Newspoll for the first time as Prime Minister Anthony Albanese’s popularity plumbs fresh lows.

title: Peru on Edge as Pollsters Show Leftist Holding Narrow Lead
title_cn: 民意调查显示左派微弱领先，秘鲁处于边缘
summary: Roberto Sánchez held a narrow lead in Peru’s bitterly contested presidential election, according to two quick counts, although the candidate was still locked in a statistical tie against his conservative rival.

title: Xi Lands in North Korea as Kim Draws Red Line on Nuclear Weapons
title_cn: 习近平抵达朝鲜，金正恩划定核武器红线
summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping arrived in North Korea in a likely bid to reassert Beijing’s influence over an emboldened Kim Jong Un, a neighbor with a rapidly expanding nuclear arsenal and deepening alliance with Russia.

title: Israel Strikes Iran After Missile Attack, Imperiling Trump Talks
title_cn: 以色列在导弹袭击后袭击伊朗，危及特朗普会谈
summary: Israel said it struck several military targets in Iran, retaliating against missile attacks by Tehran despite President Donald Trump’s call for Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to refrain from hitting back.

title: Cambodia Scam Centers Persist Despite Crackdown, Report Says
title_cn: 报告称，尽管受到打击，柬埔寨诈骗中心仍然存在
summary: Cambodia has failed to dismantle much of its online scam industry despite a yearlong crackdown that authorities said would eliminate it, according to an Amnesty International report that challenges official claims of success.

title: South Korea’s Lee Names Ex-Naver CEO Han as Prime Minister
title_cn: 韩国李明博任命前 Naver 首席执行官韩为总理
summary: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung nominated former Naver Corp. chief executive Han Seong Sook as prime minister, setting the stage for the country’s second female premier and elevating a technology executive to one of the nation’s highest political posts.

title: Xi Jinping Arrives in North Korea to Meet With Kim
title_cn: 习近平抵达朝鲜会见金正恩
summary: Xi Jinping and Kim Jong Un in Sept. 2025. Photographer: JADE GAO/AFP

title: UK Jobs Slump Deepens as Starmer Woes Add to Headwinds, REC Says
title_cn: REC表示，随着Starmer的困境加剧，英国就业下滑加剧
summary: British employers scaled back hiring at an accelerated pace in May amid continuing war in the Middle East and political turmoil at home, according to a survey watched by the Bank of England.

title: Kosovo Remains in Deadlock as Premier Wins Third Election in Row
title_cn: 科索沃仍陷入僵局，总理连续第三次赢得选举
summary: Kosovo Prime Minister Albin Kurti won a third election in a row while failing to secure an outright majority in parliament, raising questions about how he plans to break a political deadlock that has paralyzed the country’s fragmented politics for 18 months.

title: Pashinyan Leads in Armenia’s Vote That Had Russia in Focus
title_cn: 帕希尼扬在亚美尼亚投票中领先，俄罗斯成为焦点
summary: Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan’s party leads in Armenia’s parliamentary election that would determine whether he gets mandate strong enough to reorient the country toward Europe even as tensions with Russia grow.

title: European Leaders Join Ukraine’s Call for Ceasefire With Russia
title_cn: 欧洲领导人加入乌克兰呼吁与俄罗斯停火的行列
summary: European leaders called on Russian President Vladimir Putin to agree to an immediate and complete ceasefire that allows talks to begin on a lasting peace deal.

title: UK Plans Hospital, School Funding Cuts to Boost Defense Budget
title_cn: 英国计划削减医院和学校资金以增加国防预算
summary: The UK government is planning to cut £6 billion ($8 billion) in investment for projects such as schools and hospitals over the next four years to help fund a £15 billion increase in spending on defense, according to local media reports.

title: Key Democrat Says FISA at Risk with Trump Promotion of Pulte
title_cn: 关键民主党人表示，随着特朗普提拔普尔特，FISA 面临风险
summary: President Donald Trump’s appointment of Bill Pulte as acting director of national intelligence makes passage of a bill renewing spy powers far harder, the top Democrat on the Senate intelligence committee said.

title: Democrats Express Concern While Largely Backing Platner in Maine
title_cn: 民主党人在很大程度上支持缅因州普拉特纳的同时表示担忧
summary: Some congressional Democrats expressed wariness about Maine candidate Graham Platner ahead of Tuesday’s Senate primary following the latest round of allegations about his behavior with women.

title: Peru’s Economic Miracle Is at Stake as Voters Head to Polls
title_cn: 选民前往投票站，秘鲁的经济奇迹岌岌可危
summary: Peruvians are heading to the polls on Sunday in what is expected to be a tight presidential runoff, with the model behind one of Latin America’s most stable economies at stake.

title: South Africa to Crack Down on Illegal Migrants as Protests Surge
title_cn: 抗议活动激增南非将打击非法移民
summary: South Africa’s leader announced a crackdown on undocumented migrants in the country following a spate of protests and xenophobic attacks, while reiterating that citizens shouldn’t take the law into their own hands.

title: Democratic Primary Race in Maine Intensifies
title_cn: 缅因州民主党初选愈演愈烈
summary: Puck News Washington reporter Abby Livingston and director of The Eagleton Center for Public Interest Polling Ashley Koning join Bloomberg This Weekend to dive into the heated Democratic primary race in Maine between Senator Susan Collins and Graham Platner. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ramaphosa Unveils Action Plan to Tackle Illegal Immigration
title_cn: 拉马福萨公布打击非法移民行动计划
summary: South Africa’s leader said the government will crack down on illegal migration, amid growing protests against foreign nationals in the country.

title: Mélenchon Seeks to Rally Support to Avoid Far-Right Presidency
title_cn: 梅朗雄寻求争取支持以避免极右翼总统职位
summary: France’s veteran leftist Jean-Luc Mélenchon pitched himself on Sunday as the most viable candidate in next year’s presidential election to prevent a win by the far-right National Rally party.

title: Trump Says Fed Rate Increase Would Be Wrong Ahead of Warsh Debut
title_cn: 特朗普表示在沃什首次亮相之前美联储加息是错误的
summary: President Donald Trump said the Federal Reserve would be wrong to raise interest rates as his nominee Kevin Warsh prepares to chair his first Fed policy meeting.

title: House Republican Says Hegseth’s D-Day Remarks ‘Inappropriate’
title_cn: 众议院共和党人称赫格斯诺曼登陆日言论“不恰当”
summary: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth’s D-Day anniversary remarks criticizing what he deemed an immigrant invasion in Europe were “inappropriate,” House Republican Michael McCaul said Sunday.

title: US, Iran Appear Far From Peace Deal 100 Days Since War Began
title_cn: 战争爆发100天后，美国与伊朗似乎距离达成和平协议还很远
summary: The US and Iran appear to be making little progress toward an interim deal to end the war Washington and Israel began 100 days ago, as fresh attacks pile pressure on a fragile ceasefire.

title: Bolivia Lowers Emergency Measures Threshold as Protests Grow
title_cn: 随着抗议活动的加剧，玻利维亚降低了紧急措施的门槛
summary: Bolivia’s lower house approved a bill easing requirements for state of emergency declarations as protests and road blockades demanding President Rodrigo Paz’s resignation disrupt transport routes, deepen shortages and strain the economy.

title: Trump Calls Settlement Fund ‘Great Idea’ Despite GOP Blowback
title_cn: 尽管共和党强烈反对，特朗普仍称和解基金是“好主意”
summary: President Donald Trump said he is interested in reviving his so-called anti-weaponization fund — and left the door open to steering some of its $1.8 billion toward rioters convicted of assaulting police in the Jan. 6 Capitol attacks — during a testy interview that ended with him abruptly walking out.

title: US-China Rivalry Is Laid Bare by a Contract to Deepen an Argentine River
title_cn: 加深阿根廷河流的合同暴露了中美竞争
summary: A government tender in Argentina underscored tensions between Washington and Beijing in Latin America as President Javier Milei’s administration awarded a 25-year contract to upgrade a key trade artery to a venture with a history of ties to China.

title: Ukraine Says Drone Hit Nuclear Fuel Facility Near Chernobyl
title_cn: 乌克兰称无人机击中切尔诺贝利附近的核燃料设施
summary: Ukraine said Moscow’s forces struck a nuclear fuel storage facility near the mothballed Chernobyl power plant north of Kyiv, an incident that drew a sharp retort from the UN’s atomic watchdog.

title: Ukraine Targets St. Petersburg Before Zelenskyy Talks in UK
title_cn: 泽伦斯基在英国会谈之前乌克兰瞄准圣彼得堡
summary: Ukraine launched a drone barrage at St. Petersburg on Saturday, the final day of Russia’s premier investment forum, hours after President Vladimir Putin rejected a proposal for talks with Kyiv and ahead of a scheduled meeting between Volodymyr Zelenskyy and European leaders.

title: Italy Extends Fuel Tax Cut to July 3 to Stem Iran War Impact
title_cn: 意大利将燃油税减免期限延长至7月3日以遏制伊朗战争影响
summary: Giorgia Meloni’s government has extended a fuel tax cut for consumers as the Italian premier attempts to blunt the impact of the Iran war on fuel prices and the economy overall.
